people.person: a woman in a blue robe
people.action: holding a knife and peering around a wall corner, then recoiling in shock.

scene.setting: a room with a white paneled wall and white tiles on the lower wall.

objects.description: a large knife with a dark handle, held by the woman.
a white wall with vertical paneling, partially damaged.

interactions: The woman holds a knife in one hand while her other hand covers her face in fear.
key_actions: The woman peeks around the corner of the wall, holding a knife.
She recoils and covers her face in terror.

visual_expression.person: a woman in a blue robe
visual_expression.gaze: looking towards the left, outside the frame.

audio_description: A woman is screaming loudly and repeatedly.
